name: Test Harness
label: Test Harness (Flow Tester)
description: Runs a scenario suite against a deployed Edison flow endpoint. For each scenario, POSTs the input, polls until complete, diffs the actual response against the expected outcome. Emits per-scenario results plus an aggregate verdict. Trust anchor: hand-built, not pipeline-generated — used to validate every other flow the pipeline ships. Versioned independently so test records can pin to a specific harness revision.

inputs.label: Target Flow URL
inputs.helpText: Full URL of the flow endpoint to test — e.g. `https://em.edison.api.onereach.ai/http/<account>/<path>`. The harness will POST to this URL for each scenario.

inputs.label: Scenarios
inputs.helpText: JSON array of `{ name, input, expect }` objects. `name` is a short label; `input` is the request body for the target flow; `expect` is the match criteria — any of `{ code }`, `{ codeOneOf: [...] }`, `{ codeOneOfOrSuccess: [...] }`, `{ messageIncludes }`, `{ shape: { field: 'type' } }`.

inputs.label: Per-scenario timeout (ms)
inputs.helpText: Maximum wall-clock time for a single scenario including poll cycles. Default 30 seconds.

inputs.label: Poll interval (ms)
inputs.helpText: Sleep between polls of the target flow's async status endpoint. Default 2.5 seconds.

inputs.label: Max polls per scenario
inputs.helpText: Cap on poll attempts per scenario. At `pollDelayMs=2500` and `maxPolls=20`, a scenario times out after ~50 seconds of polling. Default 20.

inputs.label: Stop on first failure
inputs.helpText: If true, the first failing scenario ends the run. If false (default), all scenarios run so the full diff set is visible. Use true for CI gates; false for forensic runs.
